cases.expect: forks the laravel-review agent, runs parallel security/quality/laravel/testing reviewers on the PR diff, and returns a confidence-scored markdown report with a verdict
forks the laravel-review agent and reviews staged changes as a pre-commit gate, reporting only high-confidence issues with PASS/FAIL verdict
forks the laravel-review agent and audits the given path for security, quality, Laravel best-practices, and testing gaps
